eventPage.title: African University of Tourism
eventPage.venue: Sofitel Hôtel Ivoire, Abidjan, Côte d'Ivoire
eventPage.intro: The 1st African University of Tourism is an unprecedented event bringing together key players in African tourism: public institutions, private operators, investors and international experts. This intensive day aims to lay the foundations for a sustainable, competitive and inclusive African tourism.
eventPage.rectorRole: Minister of Tourism and Leisure of Côte d'Ivoire
eventPage.rectorBio: Architect of the 'Sublime Côte d'Ivoire' strategy, Mr. Fofana is an emblematic figure in tourism development in West Africa. His patronage gives this event a major institutional dimension.
eventPage.registerCta: Register for the 1st African University of Tourism

about.title: The University of High-Performing Enterprises
about.subtitle: Training tomorrow's leaders in Africa and worldwide, with the excellence of Oxford.
about.missionText1: ETHSUN Institute supports professionals, executives and leaders in their skills development through internationally certified programs. We believe that training is the most powerful lever for transforming organizations and African economies.
about.missionText2: Our programs are designed by practicing experts, rooted in African realities and enriched by international best practices.
about.visionText: To become the reference in executive education in West Africa, with international reach from Oxford and Singapore. We aspire to create an educational ecosystem that connects Africa to global standards of professional excellence.
about.founderBio: Entrepreneur and institutional development strategist, Jean-Calvin ETHIEN leads the ETHSUN ecosystem from Abidjan and Oxford. A visionary of professional training in Africa, he has created over 60 certified programs covering 12 strategic domains, training over 500 executives and leaders across West Africa.
about.founderAmbition: His ambition: to make ETHSUN a leading international training group, bridging Oxford's academic excellence with African entrepreneurial dynamism.
